meaning: 德兰士瓦省[南非(阿扎尼亚)省名]
examples: He had prospected for minerals everywhere from the Gobi Desert to the Transvaal.
The Machadodorp tuff and agglomerate, which is higher-lying than the Ongeluck lave, is known only from the Eastern Transvaal.
None of this seemed to be in Mr Dube's future when he was born, the sickly first son of a single mother on a run-down farm in East Transvaal.
They set up two fiercely independent republics in the South African heartland: the Orange Free State and the Transvaal.
In 1895, the Jameson Raid into the Transvaal to aid the Uitlanders (mainly British settlers) in the Boer republic, began.
